headlines.title: At least 90 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
headlines.description: The explosion took place at 19:29 local time on Friday at a coal mine in northern China.

headlines.title: Hot weather to intensify in UK over bank holiday weekend
headlines.description: Amber heat health alerts are in place for the Midlands, eastern and south-east England.

headlines.title: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
headlines.description: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

headlines.title: UK officials suggested single market for goods with Europe
headlines.description: Industry figures briefed on the move said the idea has not been taken forward at this point, after EU scepticism.

headlines.title: How Panorama exposed rape allegations on Married at First Sight UK
headlines.description: Two women said they were raped by their on-screen husbands during filming of the Channel 4 show.

headlines.title: 'Eat, sleep, rave, repeat': Fatboy Slim lights up Radio 1's Big Weekend
headlines.description: The veteran DJ closed out the dance-focused day as the festival landed in Sunderland's Herrington Country Park.

headlines.title: King appears as surprise guest at sold-out Shakespeare play
headlines.description: The monarch sat with the audience to watch a performance of the Royal Shakespeare Company's The Tempest.

headlines.title: ‘This is not a cosmetic trend’: Behind the rise in breast reduction surgery
headlines.description: For the first time, more people in the UK are choosing reduction procedures than enlargements.

headlines.title: Charmain 'was on a mission' to find out who her prophet husband was. Then she died
headlines.description: After a whirlwind romance and quickfire wedding, she was mysteriously found dead in a bathtub in Ghana.

headlines.title: The 'raucous' debut novel set entirely on one epic night out
headlines.description: Sufiyaan Salam has won an award from Stormzy, been nominated for a Bafta and made a video for Elton John.

headlines.title: Lessons from an Ebola survivor and experts on the front lines of previous outbreak
headlines.description: Those caught up in West Africa's Ebola outbreak a decade ago on how best to tackle the current epidemic.

headlines.title: Ice baths, almond milk and meditation: The secrets of Mo Salah's success
headlines.description: He's been hailed as an all-time great - but there's more to his success than meets the eye.

headlines.title: Reform councillor assaulted woman while working pub doors
headlines.description: The Labour Party has said it is "deeply concerned" by Reform's vetting procedures.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Heat leaves Africa and Med in shade' and 'Can't cope without Catherine'
headlines.description: An expected heatwave, tax proposals and the Prince of Wales are prominent on Saturday's papers.

headlines.title: Red Arrows to fly with fewer jets to preserve ageing fleet
headlines.description: The famous display team will fly with seven rather than nine aircraft for most of its displays.

headlines.title: 'Out of this world' race to create gym equipment for astronauts
headlines.description: Scientists are attempting to build exercise equipment to be used on future space flights.

headlines.title: Trump is putting pressure on Cuba - why and to what end?
headlines.description: The US has warned that a peaceful agreement with Cuba is unlikely, Havana insists this is a "fraudulent case" designed to justify military intervention.

headlines.title: Attorney general to review teen boys' rape sentences
headlines.description: The three teenagers were not given custodial sentences for their roles in the rape of two girls.

headlines.title: She was killed by her stalker. Could social media companies have saved her?
headlines.description: A new law in the US will compel social media companies to comply with police warrants within days in cases of stalking.

headlines.title: Race Across the World pairs unite for tribute run
headlines.description: Pairs from every series will race in the Greater Manchester Run a year after Sam Gardiner's death.

headlines.title: The twins who make people look twice at emergency callouts
headlines.description: Identical twins Lee and Liam Myers both work with the emergency services in the Scottish Borders.

headlines.title: Giant moon and UFO take over Chelsea streets
headlines.description: London's largest free flower festival returns to Chelsea with a cosmic "Out of this World" theme.

headlines.title: Pony rescued from inside tractor tyre
headlines.description: The RSPCA slowly freed the pony with help from residents in Stoke-on-Trent.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: By-Electioncast: Everything You Need To Know About Makerfield
headlines.description: Is this the most consequential by-election ever?

headlines.title: Will Trump invade Cuba?
headlines.description: The US charges Cuba’s 94-year-old former president Raul Castro with murder.

headlines.title: 'Unselfish' over 'ego' - what do leaks say about Tuchel's England?
headlines.description: BBC Sport explores why the whole world knew the England World Cup squad before it was announced, and what Thomas Tuchel's response says about England's culture.

headlines.title: Hull and Middlesbrough set for unique play-off final
headlines.description: BBC Sport looks at the Championship play-off finalists Hull City and Middlesbrough after the build-up was dominated by Southampton and Spygate.

headlines.title: Russell edges out Antonelli to take Canada sprint pole
headlines.description: George Russell edges out Mercedes team-mate Kimi Antonelli to take pole position for the sprint race at the Canadian Grand Prix.

headlines.title: Usyk v Verhoeven world title fight predictions
headlines.description: Boxing world offer their predictions for Oleksandr Usyk's world title defence against Rico Verhoeven on Saturday.

headlines.title: Final heartbreak in Bilbao - but how have Ulster progressed?
headlines.description: Ulster head coach Richie Murphy accepts his side were second best to Montpellier in the Challenge Cup final, but how have they progressed this season?

headlines.title: Maguire World Cup omission a shock - Rooney
headlines.description: Former England captain Wayne Rooney says Harry Maguire is "very unlucky" to miss out on a place in Thomas Tuchel's World Cup squad this summer.

headlines.title: Robertson, Dalglish and a special connection between Liverpool and Scotland
headlines.description: Scotland captain Andy Robertson speaks to Kelly Cates and her father Sir Kenny Dalglish before his last game for Liverpool.
